# README

The folder with minimal Exomiser database files for testing.

## 9999_hg38_variants.mv.db

Generated from `2402_hg38_variants.mv.db` in `CreateTestMVStoresTest.java` using `protobuf-java==[3.21.12, 4)`.

The file should be retained to show backward compatibility.

## 9999_hg38_clinvar.mv.db

Generated from `2402_hg38_clinvar.mv.db` in `CreateTestMVStoresTest.java` using `protobuf-java==[3.21.12, 4)`.

The file should be retained to show backward compatibility.

## 2512_hg38_variants.mini.mv.db

Generated from `2512_hg38_variants.mv.db` in `CreateTestMVStoresTest.java` using `protobuf-java==4.34.1`.

## 2512_hg38_clinvar.mini.mv.db

Generated from `2512_hg38_clinvar.mv.db` in `CreateTestMVStoresTest.java` using `protobuf-java==4.34.1`.
